Dean Foods is one of the major U.S. food and beverage companies, with its WhiteWave division the leading maker of soymilk and organic milk.
Apart from soymilk and other organic products, WhiteWave also produces such dairy-related items as International Delight coffee creamers and other fluid dairy products.
